channel.title: Posts on Renée's Realm
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Renée's Realm

item.title: Intro
item.description:
Introduction

Hi! I’m Renée DeVivo, a Game Design and Developement and Computer Science student at the University of Arizona! This is essentially a place for me to showcase my thoughts and projects, and also so I look cool to other CS students.
item.content:
Introduction

Hi! I’m Renée DeVivo, a Game Design and Developement and Computer Science student at the University of Arizona! This is essentially a place for me to showcase my thoughts and projects, and also so I look cool to other CS students.
